busabase._note: Only used when data_provider is "busabase". Each approval-gated nudge (reminder) maps to a Busabase record commit whose fields hold type/member_id/channel/title/reason/draft. Approve->review(approved), request_changes->review(rejected), block->close, human edits->operation revision. Snapshot ingestion + the dry-run execution planner stay local-only. The open-source single-tenant apps/busabase needs no api key; only busabase-cloud does. Env overrides: KELLY_STANDUP_BUSABASE_URL / KELLY_STANDUP_BUSABASE_BASE_ID / KELLY_STANDUP_BUSABASE_API_KEY.
